title: NDA Mid-year performance report 2024 to 2025
body: "The NDA Business Plan 2024 to 2027) sets out key activities and expected progress for all 17 of the NDA’s nuclear sites over the 3 years from 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2027.  This report shows the performance on each of the key activities at the end of September 2024. Targets are grouped by strategic theme under each operating company. Also reported is Safety and Environmental information for each operating company. "

taxons.title: Radioactive and nuclear substances and waste
